title: LazyDFU Reloaded
description: This is an unofficial port of the LazyDFU mod to previously unsupported versions.
body:
Recently, I released a mod that simplifies movement in the game. Details: https://modrinth.com/mod/better-movement-(fabric)

## LazyDFU Reloaded
This mod is an unofficial port of the LazyDFU mod by content creator **astei**.
It now adds support for **Forge**, **NeoForge** modloaders, and has updated Fabric support to newer versions.
Additionally, the loading and unloading of resource packs has been further optimized.

**Link to the original mod**:
https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu

**Link to the author**:
https://modrinth.com/user/astei
